description: Multi-line text editing area. Supports plain text and (macOS/iOS 26+) attributed/markdown text.

markdown.description: Initial content as a markdown string (macOS 26 / iOS 26+); takes precedence over 'text'

placeholder.description: Placeholder text shown when the editor is empty

readOnly.description: When true, text is selectable and scrollable but not editable; default false

value.description: Current plain-text content; set via setElementValue
